categories.label: Service Exposure

categories.label: Data Leaks

templates.title: DMARC policy is 'none' (monitoring only) for {asset}
templates.summary: DMARC is in monitor-only mode — spoofed emails still get delivered.

templates.title: No DMARC record for {asset}
templates.summary: Your domain has no DMARC record, leaving email authentication unenforced.

templates.title: No SPF record for {asset}
templates.summary: Your domain has no SPF record, so anyone can send emails pretending to be you.

templates.title: SPF record allows all senders (+all) for {asset}
templates.summary: Your SPF record allows anyone to send email as your domain — it's wide open.

templates.title: HTTP does not redirect to HTTPS on {asset}
templates.summary: Visitors who don't type 'https://' get an unencrypted, insecure connection.

templates.title: End-of-life software detected on {asset}
templates.summary: We detected end-of-life software on your server that no longer gets security patches.

templates.title: SSL certificate expires in {value} days on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your SSL certificate expires in less than a week — renew it now to avoid downtime.

templates.title: SSL certificate hostname mismatch on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your SSL certificate was issued for a different domain — browsers show a mismatch warning.

templates.title: Only deprecated TLS versions supported on {asset}
templates.summary: Your server only supports outdated encryption — modern browsers can't connect at all.

templates.title: Self-signed SSL certificate on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site uses a self-signed certificate — browsers will warn visitors it's not trusted.

templates.title: TLS 1.0 enabled on {asset}
templates.summary: Your server still supports TLS 1.0, which has known security vulnerabilities.

templates.title: Dangling CNAME at {asset} → {cname_target}
templates.summary: One of your subdomains points to a third-party service that no longer exists — likely a takeover risk.

templates.title: Cookie '{value}' missing HttpOnly flag
templates.summary: A cookie on your site can be stolen through JavaScript injection attacks.

templates.title: Cookie '{value}' missing SameSite attribute
templates.summary: A cookie on your site is sent with cross-site requests, which could enable forgery attacks.

templates.title: Cookie '{value}' missing Secure flag
templates.summary: A cookie on your site can be stolen by anyone on the same network.

templates.title: DMARC record has no reporting address (rua) for {asset}
templates.summary: You're not receiving DMARC reports because no reporting address is set.

templates.title: No DKIM records found for {asset}
templates.summary: No DKIM email signing was found, so recipients can't verify your emails are genuine.

templates.title: Only one nameserver for {asset}
templates.summary: Your domain relies on a single nameserver — if it fails, your site goes offline.

templates.title: SPF uses neutral (?all) for {asset}
templates.summary: Your SPF record is set to neutral, which provides no email protection at all.

templates.title: SPF uses softfail (~all) for {asset}
templates.summary: Your SPF record flags unauthorized emails but doesn't block them.

templates.title: SPF record exceeds 10-lookup limit for {asset}
templates.summary: Your SPF record has too many DNS lookups and may break email authentication.

templates.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site has no Content Security Policy, leaving it more vulnerable to XSS attacks.

templates.title: Missing Permissions-Policy header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site doesn't restrict browser features like camera and mic access for embedded content.

templates.title: Missing Referrer-Policy header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site leaks full page URLs to third parties when users click links.

templates.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site doesn't force browsers to always use HTTPS, allowing downgrade attacks.

templates.title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Browsers may misinterpret file types on your site, which could enable script injection.

templates.title: Missing X-Frame-Options header on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your site can be embedded in malicious iframes, enabling clickjacking attacks.

templates.title: DMARC record changed for {asset}
templates.summary: Your DMARC email security record was just changed.

templates.title: New service detected on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: A new service appeared on your server that wasn't running before.

templates.title: SPF record changed for {asset}
templates.summary: Your email SPF record was just changed — make sure it was authorized.

templates.title: SSL certificate expires in {value} days on {asset}:{port}
templates.summary: Your SSL certificate expires within a month — plan to renew it soon.

templates.title: TLS 1.1 enabled on {asset}
templates.summary: Your server supports TLS 1.1, which is outdated and being dropped by browsers.

templates.title: Suspicious CNAME at {asset} → {cname_target}
templates.summary: A CNAME on your domain points to a third-party service we couldn't verify — worth a manual check.

templates.title: End-of-life software: {value} on {asset}
templates.summary: You're running end-of-life software that no longer gets security updates.

templates.title: No IPv6 (AAAA) records for {asset}
